_note: Each job renders as a flip card on the Careers page. The FRONT shows title / department / location. The BACK shows summary + responsibilities + requirements + Apply button. To hide ALL jobs and show a 'no openings' message, set jobs to an empty array: []

jobs.title: Project Manager (Industrial Projects)
jobs.summary: Lead the end-to-end delivery of large-scale industrial construction projects — from mobilisation to handover.
responsibilities: Overall responsibility for site execution, cost, quality, and safety
Client and consultant management at project level
Subcontractor coordination and progress oversight
Risk, variation, and contractual administration
requirements: Degree in Civil / Structural Engineering or equivalent
8+ years main-contractor experience on industrial projects
Strong knowledge of Malaysian building codes and CIDB requirements
Demonstrated delivery of turnkey or design-and-build projects

jobs.title: Site Engineer
jobs.summary: Supervise day-to-day site construction activities and drive on-time, on-quality delivery under the Project Manager.
responsibilities: Daily supervision of trade contractors and site teams
Setting out, quality checks, and site reporting
Coordination with design team on RFIs and site queries
Safety walk-downs and toolbox talk support
requirements: Degree / Diploma in Civil Engineering or related
3+ years site experience
Strong site coordination and documentation skills

jobs.title: Architect
jobs.summary: Support SQA's turnkey and design-and-build capability with architectural design, coordination, and documentation.
responsibilities: Design development for industrial, commercial, and residential schemes
Authority submissions and approvals coordination
Design-to-cost coordination with QS and project teams
Oversight of consultants where used on individual projects
requirements: Degree / Bachelor in Architecture (LAM Part II preferred)
5+ years post-qualification experience in Malaysia
Strong BIM / Revit or equivalent 3D modelling

jobs.title: Mechanical & Electrical Engineer
jobs.summary: Lead design review, coordination, and site commissioning of mechanical and electrical systems across projects.
responsibilities: Review and coordination of M&E design across trades
Value-engineering proposals and procurement support
Site installation supervision and commissioning sign-off
requirements: Degree in Mechanical / Electrical Engineering
5+ years M&E consultancy or contractor experience
Experience with industrial / cold-chain / commercial fit-out a plus

jobs.title: Quantity Surveyor
jobs.summary: Support commercial management of SQA projects — from tendering through final accounts.
responsibilities: Cost planning, BQ preparation, and tender analysis
Variation and progress claim management
Sub-contract packaging and letting
Final accounts and cost close-out
requirements: Degree in Quantity Surveying (RISM / BQSM membership a plus)
4+ years main-contractor QS experience
Strong familiarity with PAM and PWD contract forms

jobs.title: Safety & Health Officer
jobs.summary: Champion SQA's safety culture on site — from daily toolbox meetings to weekly appraisal boards.
responsibilities: Site safety inspection, hazard identification, and reporting
Lead daily toolbox meetings and safety briefings
Maintain weekly safety appraisal reports for management review
Incident investigation and corrective action follow-through
requirements: NIOSH-certified Safety & Health Officer (registered with DOSH)
5+ years site safety experience on main-contractor projects
Hands-on, disciplined, and unafraid to raise standards

jobs.title: Business Development Executive
jobs.summary: Support the tender pipeline, client engagement, and new business development activities of SQA.
responsibilities: Tender tracking, pre-qualification, and proposal support
Client and consultant relationship management
Market research and opportunity screening
CRM upkeep and reporting to senior management
requirements: Degree in Construction / Engineering / Business or related
3+ years construction industry experience
Strong written and interpersonal skills

jobs.title: Accounts Executive
jobs.summary: Handle day-to-day accounting, reporting, and payment processing for SQA Builders.
responsibilities: Accounts payable and receivable
Monthly closing and management reporting support
Statutory and tax submissions
Project cost tracking in coordination with QS team
requirements: Degree / Professional qualification in Accounting
3+ years relevant experience, preferably in construction
Comfortable with accounting systems (SQL / AutoCount / similar)
